phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cable car ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do teleférico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese staff prioritize concise, factual directions over pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o teleférico.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the cable car.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the cable car.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o teleférico.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the herb garden
phrases.text_local: Como encontro o jardim de ervas?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo ayng-KOHNGT-roo AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DIH EH-ruh-vuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Madeira's terrain is hilly; staff often reference stairs or slopes.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Aromáticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Herb Garden.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Herb Garden.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim das Aromáticas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the cable car ticket booth is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira do teleférico?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: A bilheteira do teleférico é sinalizada no jardim.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as placas do teleférico.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the cable car signs.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the cable car signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh DOO teh-lih-FEH-ree-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as placas do teleférico.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Casa das Borboletas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH KAH-zuh DUHSH boo-ruh-boo-LEH-tuhsh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Casa das Borboletas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DUHSH boo-ruh-boo-LEH-tuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Butterfly House.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Butterfly House.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH KAH-zuh DUHSH boo-ruh-boo-LEH-tuhsh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Casa das Borboletas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the orchid house is
phrases.text_local: Onde está localizada a Estufa das Orquídeas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ehs-TAH loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duh AH SHTOO-fuh DUHSH aw-ruh-KEE-deeuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: Garden paths are clearly signposted in Portuguese and English.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga os sinais no caminho central.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH NOO kuh-MEE-nyoo sayngt-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs on the central path.

responses.english: Good morning, follow the signs on the central path.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh OOSH see-NEYESH NOO kuh-MEE-nyoo sayngt-RAHL.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga os sinais no caminho central.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to find the herb garden
phrases.text_local: Como chego ao Jardim das Aromáticas?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: O Jardim das Aromáticas é uma área sinalizada no jardim botânico.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, siga as indicações para o Jardim das Aromáticas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, follow the signs to the Herb Garden.

responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, SEE-guh UHSH een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN DUHSH uh-roo-MAH-tee-kuhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, siga as indicações para o Jardim das Aromáticas.
